Biography
Biography
Konstantina Bairaktari is a doctoral student at the Khoury College of Computer Sciences, advised by Huy Lê Nguyen and Jonathan Ullman. Since joining Khoury College in 2020, her research has focused on algorithms and theory, and she is affiliated with the college’s Algorithms and Theory group. In 2021, she co-authored a paper with her advisors dealing with fair and optimal cohort selection for linear utilities.
